market_context: Monday tape neutral: 'Dow Gains 150 Points But Records Weekly Loss: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear & Greed Index Remains In Neutral Zone' (07-13), while 'S&P 500 Index Forms Highly Bullish Pattern as Analysts Warn of Earnings Bubble' (07-12) cuts both ways. VOO 693.90, at the top of its 30d range. Data pull PARTIAL for the 7th consecutive run: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news intact — sector caps remain unenforceable, so any buy would be rejected sector-unknown. Portfolio is 100% cash, so the holdings-only breaking-news web sweep was not applicable. Every ticker's headline list was non-empty today. JNJ and UNH Q2 earnings are imminent, adding event risk. Note: no routine run happened on Friday 07-10 (gap in the record). All holds.

signals.thesis: Apple sued OpenAI alleging hardware trade-secret theft by ex-employees (07-13) — a distraction and IP-risk story, not a demand datapoint; the weekly recap's $30B Broadcom deal (07-12) is capex color without terms. Price 315.32, top of the 30d range, +4.6% over 30d; no fundamentals this run. Falsified toward sell if discovery shows roadmap leakage or China weakness resurfaces; toward buy if margin guidance confirms pricing power.
sources: benzinga: Apple Stock Trending After Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Trade Secrets (2026-07-13)
benzinga: Consumer Tech News (July 6-10): Micron Plans $250B US Expansion, Apple Signs $30B Broadcom Deal & More (2026-07-12)

signals.thesis: Two-sided: Berkshire's Alphabet stake framed as Greg Abel expanding the playbook (07-10) is a genuine accumulation datapoint, but 'OpenAI, Google AI Models Being Sold to Pentagon-Blacklisted Chinese Tech Giants' (07-10) raises export-control risk. Price 357.17 at the 30d low, -8% over 30d; no fundamentals this run to judge valuation. Falsified toward buy if Cloud guidance confirms value at the low; toward sell on formal export-control action.

signals.thesis: All fresh headlines are price-target chatter (BofA neutral $263 on 07-10; MS/Citi raises 07-08), ignored per policy; the last hard catalyst remains the 07-08 FDA approval of the THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH SF catheter platform. Close 256.93, above the 240 falsification line but fading from 267.16 (07-07) into imminent Q2 earnings. Buy re-entry stays parked: 7th straight run without fundamentals means sector-unknown rejection, and pre-earnings entry adds gap risk. Falsified if close < 240.

Falsified toward sell if Azure prints soft; toward buy if margin guidance rises on the cost-cut story.

Price 210.99 after a +8% two-session rebound off 202.70 — chasing a Friday pop on one supplier datapoint fails the two-source conviction bar. Falsified toward buy on a second independent demand datapoint; toward sell if 192 breaks.

signals.thesis: Berkshire's UnitedHealth accumulation (07-10) is a real quality endorsement, but 'Bearish Chart Pattern Raises Stakes for Q2 Earnings' (07-12) flags event risk this week, and RBC/HSBC PT notes are chatter, ignored per policy. Close 424.57, +9% over 30d, off the 431.66 high. Initiating into a Q2 print with no fundamentals data fails the caution bar. Falsified toward buy on an in-line Q2 with intact cost-trend guidance; toward sell if medical-cost trend deteriorates.
